author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #34 - Econ Report Q3 is happening this Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!  

This week’s topic is the Q3 Econ Report. We will have Eric and Steven from the Star Atlas Econ team answering questions and helping us better understand the state of the Star Atlas Economy! 

The Atlas Brew is a WEEKLY Star Atlas Community Event based around having fun, speculating about the future, and much more. 

See you all on Wednesday at 19:00 UTC on the Voice Channel! Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! The winner gets one ship!

Nothing discussed in The Atlas Brew is guaranteed to make it to game and the event is purely for entertainment purposes.

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1029033619903217694
